title: Unique Item ID in My Work Tab
excerpt: I think implementing the option to see the unique Item ID in the My Work tab would be beneficial. People could use the Item ID to organize work, make quick references in discussion with others to what is needed, and see …

posts.author: rchl (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml:
I think implementing the option to see the unique Item ID in the My Work tab would be beneficial. People could use the Item ID to organize work, make quick references in discussion with others to what is needed, and see at a quick view personal projects open.

Just a suggestion, as I know it’d help the people in my Org.
